name: App Workspace Sidebar & Search Navigation
uri: / (persistent layout component — not a routed page)
notes: The Sidebar renders four fixed nav items (documents, upload, search, tags); clicking any item lifts activeSection state to App.jsx via the onNavigate callback prop.

App.jsx owns activeSection state and passes it back to Sidebar for active-item highlighting — but the current implementation renders DocumentGrid regardless of which section is active, so section switching is purely cosmetic.

SearchBar.jsx sits in a toolbar strip above DocumentGrid; its onSearch prop chains through App.handleSearch to DocumentGrid.handleSearch via an imperative React ref — an anti-pattern that creates tight coupling between App and DocumentGrid.

Two separate search paths coexist: SearchBar submits GET /api/search?q= (server-side ILIKE), while DocumentGrid's internal Filter input does synchronous client-side filtering on the already-loaded documents list.
